# Endodontic Workflow Graph

Generated from `src/nodedent/protocol/nodes.ts` by `npm run docs:workflow-graph`.

## Summary

- Nodes: 60
- Edges: 121
- Self-loops: 5
- Difficulty edges: 58
- Phases: 15

## Reading The Graph

- Each node shows the chairside card title and protocol node id.
- Edge labels show the decision option, self-loop marker, difficulty flag, and note event type when present.
- Caution, high, and referral branches use distinct edge colors in Mermaid renderers.
- The standalone Mermaid source is [endo-workflow.mmd](endo-workflow.mmd).

## Mermaid

```mermaid
%% Generated by scripts/export-protocol-graph.ts from src/nodedent/protocol/nodes.ts
flowchart TD
  classDef default fill:#ffffff,stroke:#d8e0ec,color:#0f1f3d;
  classDef caution fill:#fff7e6,stroke:#d99a2b,color:#4a3200;
  classDef high fill:#ffecec,stroke:#d15252,color:#5b0000;
  classDef refer fill:#f5e8ff,stroke:#8651c8,color:#2d0b52;
  subgraph phase_node_Pre_op["Pre-op"]
    node_preop["Pre-op setup<br/><small>preop</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Access["Access"]
    node_access_chamber["Access pulp chamber<br/><small>access-chamber</small>"]
    node_access_reassess["Stop and reassess access direction<br/><small>access-reassess</small>"]
    node_confirm_chamber["Confirm chamber access<br/><small>confirm-chamber</small>"]
    node_refine_access["Refine access outline<br/><small>refine-access</small>"]
    node_identify_canals["Identify canals<br/><small>identify-canals</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Initial_scouting["Initial scouting"]
    node_estimate_wl["Estimate working length<br/><small>estimate-wl</small>"]
    node_advance_10c["Advance 10C to passive resistance<br/><small>advance-10c</small>"]
    node_measure_available_space["Measure available treatment space<br/><small>measure-available-space</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Working_length["Working length"]
    node_open_orifice["Open canal orifice<br/><small>open-orifice</small>"]
    node_dry_canal["Dry canal for EAL<br/><small>dry-canal</small>"]
    node_attach_eal["Attach EAL to 10C file<br/><small>attach-eal</small>"]
    node_establish_eal0["Establish EAL 0<br/><small>establish-eal0</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Glide_path["Glide path"]
    node_patency_10c["10C to patency length until super loose<br/><small>patency-10c</small>"]
    node_guide_path["Create guide path<br/><small>guide-path</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Shaping["Shaping"]
    node_gauge_final_shape["Gauge for final shape<br/><small>gauge-final-shape</small>"]
    node_increase_shaping_gauge["Increase NiTi hand-file gauge<br/><small>increase-shaping-gauge</small>"]
    node_create_final_shape["Complete final shaping<br/><small>create-final-shape</small>"]
    node_irrigate_recapitulate["Irrigate and recapitulate<br/><small>irrigate-recapitulate</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Smear___disinfection["Smear / disinfection"]
    node_remove_smear_layer["Remove smear layer<br/><small>remove-smear-layer</small>"]
    node_agitate_edta["Agitate EDTA<br/><small>agitate-edta</small>"]
    node_final_naocl["Final NaOCl disinfection<br/><small>final-naocl</small>"]
    node_ready_for_obturation["Ready for obturation gauging<br/><small>ready-for-obturation</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Obturation_gauging["Obturation gauging"]
    node_gauge_obturation_30["Gauge obturation with size 30 NiTi<br/><small>gauge-obturation-30</small>"]
    node_gauge_obturation_25["Gauge obturation with size 25 NiTi<br/><small>gauge-obturation-25</small>"]
    node_gauge_obturation_larger["Gauge with next larger NiTi file<br/><small>gauge-obturation-larger</small>"]
    node_record_obturation_gauge["Record obturation gauge<br/><small>record-obturation-gauge</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Cone_fit["Cone fit"]
    node_fit_master_cone["Fit tapered master cone<br/><small>fit-master-cone</small>"]
    node_cone_short["Master cone short<br/><small>cone-short</small>"]
    node_cone_long["Master cone long<br/><small>cone-long</small>"]
    node_cone_fit_radiograph["Confirm cone fit radiographically<br/><small>cone-fit-radiograph</small>"]
    node_ready_for_sealer_cone_seating["Ready for sealer / cone seating<br/><small>ready-for-sealer-cone-seating</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Sealer___cone_seating["Sealer / cone seating"]
    node_dry_for_obturation["Dry canal for obturation<br/><small>dry-for-obturation</small>"]
    node_patency_before_sealer["Confirm patency before sealer<br/><small>patency-before-sealer</small>"]
    node_apply_sealer["Apply sealer into canal<br/><small>apply-sealer</small>"]
    node_paper_point_through_sealer["Paper point through sealer<br/><small>paper-point-through-sealer</small>"]
    node_reapply_sealer["Re-apply sealer into canal<br/><small>reapply-sealer</small>"]
    node_seat_gp_cone["Seat pre-fit GP cone<br/><small>seat-gp-cone</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Downpack___backfill["Downpack / backfill"]
    node_evaluate_orifice_gap["Evaluate orifice gap space<br/><small>evaluate-orifice-gap</small>"]
    node_modified_downpack["Modified GP downpack<br/><small>modified-downpack</small>"]
    node_add_accessory_cones["Add accessory GP cones<br/><small>add-accessory-cones</small>"]
    node_sear_gp_cones["Sear GP cones<br/><small>sear-gp-cones</small>"]
    node_vertical_compaction["Light vertical compaction<br/><small>vertical-compaction</small>"]
    node_reapply_sealer_on_gp["Re-apply sealer over visible GP<br/><small>reapply-sealer-on-gp</small>"]
    node_backfill_canal["Backfill remaining canal space<br/><small>backfill-canal</small>"]
    node_compact_backfill["Compact injected GP<br/><small>compact-backfill</small>"]
    node_canal_obturation_complete["Active canal obturation complete<br/><small>canal-obturation-complete</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Closure["Closure"]
    node_cleanup_chamber["Clean pulp chamber<br/><small>cleanup-chamber</small>"]
    node_rinse_chamber["Rinse pulp chamber<br/><small>rinse-chamber</small>"]
    node_close_access["Close access<br/><small>close-access</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Troubleshooting["Troubleshooting"]
    node_limited_space_warning["Limited treatment space warning<br/><small>limited-space-warning</small>"]
    node_file_stop_vs_resistance["File resistance vs file stop<br/><small>file-stop-vs-resistance</small>"]
    node_prebend_10c["Pre-bend 10C file<br/><small>prebend-10c</small>"]
    node_middle_third_guide_path["Open middle third<br/><small>middle-third-guide-path</small>"]
    node_persistent_wet["Persistent wet canal<br/><small>persistent-wet</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Medication___temporisation["Medication / temporisation"]
    node_calcium_hydroxide["Place calcium hydroxide<br/><small>calcium-hydroxide</small>"]
    node_temporary_closure["Temporary closure<br/><small>temporary-closure</small>"]
    node_refer_pathway["Referral / stop pathway<br/><small>refer-pathway</small>"]
    node_referral_next_step["After referral documentation<br/><small>referral-next-step</small>"]
  end
  subgraph phase_node_Export["Export"]
    node_endodontic_pathway_complete["Pathway complete<br/><small>endodontic-pathway-complete</small>"]
  end
  node_preop -->|"Pre-op review complete &#124; event: preop.reviewCompleted"| node_access_chamber
  node_access_chamber -->|"Chamber reached &#124; event: access.chamberReached"| node_confirm_chamber
  node_access_chamber -->|"Marked depth reached but chamber not found &#124; difficulty: caution &#124; event: access.markedDepthNoChamber"| node_access_reassess
  linkStyle 2 stroke:#d99a2b,stroke-width:2px;

  linkStyle 103 stroke:#d99a2b,stroke-width:2px;
  node_compact_backfill -->|"Excess GP extends into chamber &#124; event: backfill.excessInChamber"| node_canal_obturation_complete
  node_compact_backfill -->|"Plugger pokes holes &#124; difficulty: caution &#124; event: backfill.pluggerHoles"| node_backfill_canal
  linkStyle 105 stroke:#d99a2b,stroke-width:2px;
  node_canal_obturation_complete -->|"All canals obturated; proceed to chamber cleanup &#124; event: workflow.allCanalsReadyForClosure"| node_cleanup_chamber
  node_cleanup_chamber -->|"Residual GP removed from chamber &#124; event: closure.chamberGpRemoved"| node_rinse_chamber
  node_rinse_chamber -->|"Chamber rinsed clean &#124; event: closure.chamberRinsed"| node_close_access
  node_close_access -->|"Sponge and temporary restoration placed &#124; event: closure.temporary"| node_endodontic_pathway_complete
  node_close_access -->|"Orifice barrier and temporary restoration placed &#124; event: closure.orificeBarrierTemporary"| node_endodontic_pathway_complete
  node_close_access -->|"Final restoration placed &#124; event: closure.finalRestoration"| node_endodontic_pathway_complete
  node_persistent_wet -->|"Canal dried &#124; event: drying.canalDriedAfterRepeat"| node_attach_eal
  node_persistent_wet -->|"Persistent wet canal · place calcium hydroxide &#124; difficulty: high &#124; event: drying.persistentWetConfirmed"| node_calcium_hydroxide
  linkStyle 113 stroke:#d15252,stroke-width:2px;
  node_calcium_hydroxide -->|"Calcium hydroxide placed &#124; event: medication.calciumHydroxidePlaced"| node_temporary_closure
  node_temporary_closure -->|"Access temporized &#124; event: closure.temporary"| node_endodontic_pathway_complete
  node_refer_pathway -->|"Document referral recommended &#124; difficulty: refer &#124; event: treatment.referralRecommended"| node_referral_next_step
  linkStyle 116 stroke:#8651c8,stroke-width:2px;
  node_refer_pathway -->|"Medicate and temporize instead &#124; difficulty: refer &#124; event: treatment.medicateTemporizeSelected"| node_calcium_hydroxide
  linkStyle 117 stroke:#8651c8,stroke-width:2px;
  node_referral_next_step -->|"Medicate and temporize before referral &#124; difficulty: refer &#124; event: treatment.medicateTemporizeSelected"| node_calcium_hydroxide
  linkStyle 118 stroke:#8651c8,stroke-width:2px;
  node_referral_next_step -->|"No medication needed; finish referral note &#124; difficulty: refer &#124; event: treatment.referralOnlyCompleted"| node_endodontic_pathway_complete
  linkStyle 119 stroke:#8651c8,stroke-width:2px;
  node_endodontic_pathway_complete -->|"Return to pre-op &#124; event: workflow.returnedToStart"| node_preop
```
